title: Lint/refactor batch: clean a messy module to zero ESLint warnings
strength: Mechanical-but-broad cleanup across a file where many small edits must all land.
prompt: src/orders.js is functional but messy: it has unused variables, uses `var`, has loose equality (==), uses string concatenation instead of template literals, and a couple of functions that could be simplified. An ESLint flat config (eslint.config.js) is already present and reports multiple warnings/errors. Refactor src/orders.js so that `npx eslint src` reports ZERO problems, WITHOUT changing the observable behaviour: the existing tests in test/orders.test.js must still pass unchanged. Do not weaken the eslint config or add disable comments — fix the code itself.
